UMGCCC Flow Core Aria II  

Running Samples 

Place tube in tube holder 

Click “load” 

Flow rate should not be above 4.0, event rate should be under 10,000 evt/s 

 

To Sort 

Click “Sort” on sort layout (window should be on right-hand screen) 

Click ‘OK” on pop-up concerning the waste drawer 

Click “OK” on save sort layout 

 

Unloading tube 

Click “Unload” 

 

Cleaning After Run 

Run a tube of Bleach 

About 5 minutes 

Flow Rate = 11 

Run a tube of Water 

About 2.5 min 

Flow Rate = 11 

Shut Down 

Turn off Stream 

Press green check mark on stream window 

Close Software 

Turn off Aria 

Green Button on the left side of Aria 

Turn off Bubble Hood 

Flip red switch on power strip in front of computer monitors
